---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

:::::: grid
:::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
# Lerneir Ruiz

::: {.about-links style="margin-top: 1em; margin-bottom: 2em;"}
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/lerneir-ruiz-cifuentes-174350122/" class="btn btn-outline-primary" role="button"> <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn </a> <a href="https://github.com/lerneir" class="btn btn-outline-primary" role="button"> <i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub </a> <a href="mailto:lerneir@yahoo.com" class="btn btn-outline-primary" role="button"> <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email </a>
:::

I am a **Data & Business Analyst** with a strong background in **Finance and International Trade**, currently based in **Ontario**.
::::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .text-center}
![](profile.jpg){.rounded-circle width="250px" style="border: 2px solid #dee2e6;"}
:::
::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Hello!

I am pursuing my **Master of Data Analytics** at the University of Niagara Falls Canada (UNFC). My passion lies in bridging the gap between complex data and actionable business strategies. I leverage tools like **Python, SQL, and Tableau** to help organizations optimize portfolios and mitigate risk.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Featured Projects

### **1. [Professional S&P 500 Portfolio Optimization Framework](projects/SP500_Portfolio/notebooks/SP500-Portfolio.ipynb)**

**Tools:** Python, Pandas, Machine Learning, Optimization Engines

-   **Objective:** Implemented a professional-grade Walk-Forward Portfolio Optimization system comparing Sharpe, Sortino, and HRP (Machine learning) strategies.
-   **Value:** Demonstrates how dynamic rebalancing and institutional constraints (like 25% max weights and transaction friction) can significantly outperform static benchmarks while maintaining a realistic risk profile for actual capital deployment.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Technical Skills

| Domain | Tools & Technologies |
|:-----------------------------------|:-----------------------------------|
| **Data Analysis** | SQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MS-SQL), NoSQL (MongoDB), Python (pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn), R (tidyverse) |
| **Data Formats & Integration** | JSON, XML, API data consumption, data transformation |
| **Data Engineering Fundamentals** | ETL pipelines, automation of reporting workflows, data cleaning and transformation |
| **Finance** | Portfolio Optimization, Risk Management, Time Series Analysis |
| **Visualization** | Tableau, Power BI, Matplotlib, Seaborn |
| **Machine Learning** | Scikit-learn, Regression, Classification Models |
